## Context

Full rescan of the HyperaFinOps Azure FinOps project docs. Last scan: 2026-04-27. Since then: graphify-out/ knowledge graph added, 34 Power BI web screenshots added to docs/screenshots/, dashboard-spec.md added, new Plans files added, YAML snapshot files added. The docs/index.md is the master entry point and must be updated to reflect all new artifacts.

### Risks
- New artifacts (graphify-out, screenshots, dashboard-spec) may need new doc sections, not just date bumps
- Scan level determines depth — quick is sufficient for this known-small delta
- dashboard-spec.md is a significant new design doc that should be referenced from index.md

## Criteria

- [ ] ISC-1: Scan level selected and recorded in project-scan-report.json [E]
- [ ] ISC-2: Project classification confirmed unchanged (multi-part, 2 parts) [I]
- [ ] ISC-3: New artifact delta since 2026-04-27 fully identified [E]
- [ ] ISC-4: source-tree-analysis.md updated to include graphify-out/ directory [E]
- [ ] ISC-5: source-tree-analysis.md updated to include docs/screenshots/ directory [E]
- [ ] ISC-6: docs/index.md updated with link to dashboard-spec.md [E]
- [ ] ISC-7: docs/index.md Last Updated date changed to 2026-04-29 [E]
- [ ] ISC-8: project-scan-report.json written with all 12 steps completed [E]
- [ ] ISC-9: No existing doc content removed or broken by updates [I]
- [ ] ISC-10: No _(To be generated)_ markers present in index.md after update [E]
- [ ] ISC-A1: Unchanged docs (architecture.md, data-models.md) NOT rewritten [R]
- [ ] ISC-A2: Power BI TMDL source files NOT read during quick scan [R]
